Kinetic UI

Pro
Github615
Getting StartedMotionAI Agents

Overview

For AI Agents

Reference

MCP ServerRegistry API

AI Agents · Reference

Registry API

All endpoints are static JSON served from beui.dev. No auth, no rate limits, fully CDN-cached. Designed to be consumed directly by agents and build tools.

Endpoint index

  • GET/r

    Registry index — array of all components (slug, name, category, URLs). No files or source.

    Open
  • GET/r/{slug}

    Component detail — full entry including source files, deps, and internal utilities.

  • GET/r/{slug}.json

    shadcn registry format — installable via npx shadcn@latest add.

  • GET/r/{slug}/raw

    Raw .tsx source — plain text, ready to paste or write directly.

  • GET/registry.json

    Full shadcn directory catalog — lists every component with metadata.

    Open
  • GET/llms.txt

    llmstxt.org format — markdown index for LLM context windows.

    Open

GET /r — Registry index

Returns a lightweight catalogue of every component. Use this to build a search index or let an agent pick a slug before fetching full details.

JSONGET /r
// GET /r
[
  {
    "slug":        "tilt-card",
    "name":        "Tilt Card",
    "category":    "motion",
    "description": "Smooth 3-axis perspective tilt that tracks the cursor.",
    "page_url":    "https://beui.dev/components/motion/tilt-card",
    "detail_url":  "https://beui.dev/r/tilt-card",
    "raw_url":     "https://beui.dev/r/tilt-card/raw"
  },
  // … one entry per component
]

GET /r/{slug} — Component detail

Full entry for one component. The files array contains complete source — agents write these directly without any secondary fetches. Internal utilities are bundled as type: util.

JSONGET /r/tilt-card
// GET /r/tilt-card
{
  "slug":         "tilt-card",
  "name":         "Tilt Card",
  "category":     "motion",
  "description":  "Smooth 3-axis perspective tilt that tracks the cursor.",
  "page_url":     "https://beui.dev/components/motion/tilt-card",
  "detail_url":   "https://beui.dev/r/tilt-card",
  "raw_url":      "https://beui.dev/r/tilt-card/raw",
  "dependencies": ["motion", "lucide-react"],
  "internal":     ["@/lib/utils"],
  "files": [
    {
      "path":    "components/motion/tilt-card.tsx",
      "type":    "component",
      "content": "/* full TypeScript source */"
    },
    {
      "path":    "lib/utils.ts",
      "type":    "util",
      "content": "/* full source */"
    }
  ]
}

GET /r/{slug}.json — shadcn format

The same component in the shadcn registry wire format. Use this URL with npx shadcn@latest add to install via the official CLI. Components use shadcn semantic color tokens, not beUI-specific variables.

JSONGET /r/tilt-card.json
// GET /r/tilt-card.json  (shadcn registry format)
{
  "name":    "tilt-card",
  "type":    "registry:component",
  "files": [
    {
      "path":    "registry/tilt-card.tsx",
      "type":    "registry:component",
      "content": "/* source using shadcn semantic color classes */"
    }
  ],
  "dependencies":         ["motion", "lucide-react"],
  "devDependencies":      [],
  "registryDependencies": ["utils"]
}

GET /r/{slug}/raw — Raw source

Plain text/plain .tsx source. Useful when an agent wants to read the full implementation before deciding whether to use it, without the overhead of parsing JSON.

TSGET /r/tilt-card/raw
// GET /r/tilt-card/raw
// Returns: text/plain — the raw .tsx source, ready to drop in

"use client";
import { motion, useMotionValue, useTransform, useSpring } from "motion/react";
// …full component source

GET /registry.json — shadcn catalog

The complete shadcn directory-compatible catalog. Registered under the @kineticui namespace, so you can install any component with @kineticui/slug without providing the full URL.

JSONGET /registry.json
// GET /registry.json  (shadcn directory catalog)
{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry.json",
  "name": "@kineticui",
  "homepage": "https://beui.dev",
  "items": [
    {
      "name":  "tilt-card",
      "type":  "registry:component",
      "title": "Tilt Card",
      "description": "Smooth 3-axis perspective tilt that tracks the cursor.",
      "files": [{ "path": "registry/tilt-card.tsx", "type": "registry:component" }],
      "dependencies": ["motion", "lucide-react"]
    }
    // … all components
  ]
}

Fetch example

A complete agent workflow using fetch directly — no MCP required. Works in any JavaScript runtime.

TSagent.ts
const BASE = "https://beui.dev";

// 1. List all components
const index = await fetch(`${BASE}/r`).then((r) => r.json());

// 2. Fetch a specific component (full files + deps)
const entry = await fetch(`${BASE}/r/tilt-card`).then((r) => r.json());

// 3. Write files into the user's project
for (const file of entry.files) {
  if (file.type === "component" || file.type === "util") {
    await fs.writeFile(`src/${file.path}`, file.content);
  }
}

// 4. Install external npm packages
await exec(`pnpm add ${entry.dependencies.join(" ")}`);
